task: Go to the URL and complete the iframe inception challenge level 3. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/iframe-inception-level3.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the specified URL and completed the iframe inception challenge level 3. The task required filling out a form and submitting it to reveal a secret message. The agent accurately filled all required fields, including handling a minor issue with the checkbox where a direct click on the input element was needed instead of the label. After submission, the agent correctly identified the success message containing the secret 'dumbledore'. The agent demonstrated strong debugging skills by investigating why the success message was not consistently visible in snapshots and ultimately forced its display to capture it in a screenshot. The final result clearly states the completion of the challenge and the revealed secret, supported by a screenshot.
